title: Social Security Mission and Vision
content:
Social Security Mission and Vision

MISSION

To train professional personnel at the level of technician who will work in Social Security institutions. To train "Social Security Professionals" who are competent to meet the needs of the sector, which can carry out its profession at the national level by transferring Social Security information with modern training methods, and equipped with all aspects. In addition to theoretical knowledge, it provides students with the opportunity to actively work in the sector during their education.

VISION

The main goal of the Social Security Associate Degree Program is to be a preferred program among the social service programs that train intermediate staff needed by our country. It is to train "Social Security Professionals" who are equipped with the necessary scientific and social skills, can follow the next level of education, have critical thinking and leadership skills in the environments in which they will work, can provide interdisciplinary cooperation, can develop innovative, unique solutions with coordination ability.
